title: Goal-scoped configuration with profile/override support
goal: Konfigurationskollisionen vermeiden, indem parallele Goals jeweils eine eigene effektive Config-Snapshot nutzen statt globaler Laufzeit-Config.

problem: Globale /config-Änderungen überschreiben sich bei parallelen Szenarien.
Autopilot/Planner/Worker-Pfade lesen derzeit überwiegend AGENT_CONFIG global.
3-Szenario-Tests (opencode_preconfigured, opencode_ollama_local, ananta_ollama_local) sind parallel nicht sauber isoliert.

Das bestehende Runbook PROMPT_ANANTA_3ER_LAUF_NEW_SOFTWARE_PROJECT_OLLAMA.md und scripts/first_goal_acceptance_runner.py nutzen aktuell noch globale /config-Patches pro Szenario. Das ist als Legacy-Pfad zulässig, darf aber nicht der Zielmodus bleiben.
architectural_constraints: Änderungen müssen additive und rückwärtskompatibel sein.
Default-Zielmodus ist goal_scoped; global_config bleibt nur Legacy/Fallback für ältere Deployments.

outcomes: Jedes Goal hat eine persistierte, immutable effective config snapshot.
Runtime-Entscheidungen lesen im Goal/Task-Kontext die Goal-Snapshot statt globaler Config.
Szenario-Profile sind wiederverwendbar und zentral verwaltbar.
Parallele Szenarien laufen ohne gegenseitige Config-Kollision.
Der Acceptance-Runner unterstützt Dual-Mode: legacy_global_config und goal_scoped.
Das Runbook dokumentiert den Zielmodus goal_scoped und markiert globale /config-Szenarien als Übergang/Fallback.

acceptance_criteria.name: Goal config snapshot persisted
acceptance_criteria.check: Nach POST /goals enthält goal.execution_preferences.config_snapshot ein vollständiges, aufgelöstes Snapshot-Objekt inkl. provenance/profile_id.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Snapshot vorhanden, serialisierbar, nicht leer, versioniert.

acceptance_criteria.name: Deterministic config resolution
acceptance_criteria.check: Resolver liefert reproduzierbar: system_default <- config_profile <- goal_overrides <- task_overrides.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Gleicher Input ergibt byte-gleiches normalized Ergebnis.

acceptance_criteria.name: Backward compatibility
acceptance_criteria.check: Goals ohne profile/override laufen unverändert mit system default.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Bestehende API-Clients brechen nicht; alte Payloads weiterhin gültig.

acceptance_criteria.name: Runtime uses goal snapshot
acceptance_criteria.check: Planner, propose, execute und routing im Goal-Kontext nutzen die goal-scoped effective config.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Telemetry/Trace zeigt goal_config_source=snapshot in relevanten Pfaden.

acceptance_criteria.name: Parallel scenario isolation
acceptance_criteria.check: Drei parallele Goals mit unterschiedlichen profiles behalten ihre jeweilige provider/model/backend-Wahl bis terminal.

acceptance_criteria.name: No global drift impact
acceptance_criteria.check: Während Goal A läuft, wird globale /config geändert; Goal A bleibt auf Snapshot.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Goal A runtime decisions ändern sich nicht durch globale Änderung.

acceptance_criteria.name: Observability
acceptance_criteria.check: Read-model/API zeigt effective config summary + provenance pro Goal.

acceptance_criteria.name: Security hygiene
acceptance_criteria.check: Snapshots/API enthalten keine Secrets in Klartext.

acceptance_criteria.name: Migration safety
acceptance_criteria.check: Existing goals without snapshot werden lazy mit defaults aufgelöst.

acceptance_criteria.name: 3x3 scenario campaign
acceptance_criteria.check: 3 Szenarien x 3 Wiederholungen sind als sequentieller und optional paralleler Zusatzlauf ausführbar.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Report enthält scenario_id/label und isolierte config evidence pro run.

acceptance_criteria.name: Runner dual-mode support
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: goal_scoped injiziert config_profile/config_overrides in POST /goals; legacy_global_config patcht weiterhin /config nur als Fallback.

acceptance_criteria.name: Runbook documents target mode
acceptance_criteria.check: PROMPT_ANANTA_3ER_LAUF_NEW_SOFTWARE_PROJECT_OLLAMA.md enthält Zielmodus goal_scoped, Legacy-Hinweis, erwartete Reportfelder und Stop-Kriterien für fehlendes Snapshot-Scoping.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Operator kann ohne Architekturwissen erkennen, welcher Modus Zielmodus ist und welche Evidenz im Report erwartet wird.

acceptance_criteria.name: Goal-scoped evidence in reports
acceptance_criteria.check: Acceptance-Report enthält pro Run config_mode, config_profile, config_checksum, goal_config_source und optional effective_config_endpoint_result.
acceptance_criteria.pass_condition: Report beweist, dass Runtime-Entscheidungen aus dem Goal-Snapshot kamen, nicht aus globaler /config.

legacy_global_config.description: Bisheriger Modus: Szenario-Patches werden global über /config gesetzt. Nicht parallel-sicher.
allowed_usage: Kompatibilität mit Deployments ohne goal-scoped config

goal_scoped.description: Zielmodus: Szenario wird über execution_preferences.config_profile und optional config_overrides direkt an POST /goals gebunden.

tasks.title: Config resolution domain model
steps: Define normalized schema for effective goal config.
Implement deep merge with allowlist and conflict policy.
Implement provenance map per field (default/profile/goal/task).
Implement secret redaction policy for read APIs/logging.

tasks.title: Goal payload extensions
steps: Add optional execution_preferences.config_profile.
Add optional execution_preferences.config_overrides.
Validate schema and unknown keys handling.
Keep old payloads fully valid.

tasks.title: Persist immutable goal snapshot
steps: Resolve effective config at goal creation.
Store in goal.execution_preferences.config_snapshot.
Store config_profile/config_overrides provenance summary.
Prevent mutation of snapshot during runtime.

tasks.title: Runtime accessor abstraction
steps: Implement get_effective_config(goal_id, task_id=None).
Fallback to global config when goal snapshot absent.
Add helper for scoped reads in routes/services.

tasks.title: Planner path migration
steps: Use goal-scoped effective config in planning provider/model decisions.
Emit trace metadata goal_config_source=snapshot|global_fallback.

tasks.title: Autopilot propose/execute path migration
steps: Read provider/model/routing knobs from goal snapshot where available.
Ensure hard-guard/backoff respect scoped config values.
Keep behavior unchanged for non-goal/scoped-missing tasks.

tasks.title: Worker dispatch policy integration
steps: Apply scoped task_kind_backend mapping from snapshot.
Preserve capability safety checks.
Record selected worker/backend with config provenance.

tasks.title: Config profile catalog
steps: Add reusable named profiles (opencode_preconfigured, opencode_ollama_local, ananta_ollama_local).
Expose profile list/read endpoints.
Validate profile existence on goal submit.

tasks.title: Goal effective-config read API
steps: Add GET /goals/{id}/effective-config.
Return snapshot + redacted fields + provenance map + checksum.

tasks.title: Runner support for goal-scoped scenario config
steps: Add --config-mode legacy_global_config|goal_scoped with goal_scoped as target default once server support is present.
In goal_scoped mode, do not call POST /config per scenario.
In goal_scoped mode, pass execution_preferences.config_profile and execution_preferences.config_overrides in POST /goals.
Keep legacy_global_config mode for older deployments and regression comparison.
Add report fields: config_mode, config_profile, config_checksum, goal_config_source, effective_config_endpoint_status.

tasks.title: Parallel scenario add-on test mode
steps: Add --parallel-goals-per-scenario N for additive stress run.
For each scenario, submit N goals concurrently with same profile.
Collect isolation evidence per goal (provider/model/backend trace).
Reject parallel mode when --config-mode legacy_global_config is active unless --allow-unsafe-global-parallel is explicitly passed.

tasks.title: Migration and compatibility
steps: Lazy fallback for legacy goals without snapshot.
Optional backfill job/script for historical goals.
Guardrails for partial/invalid snapshot.

tasks.title: Unit tests: resolver and schema
steps: Test merge precedence and deterministic output.
Test unknown keys and validation behavior.
Test redaction of secret fields.

tasks.title: API tests: goal create + effective-config
steps: POST /goals with config_profile/config_overrides persists snapshot.
GET /goals/{id}/effective-config returns redacted snapshot.
Legacy payloads still pass.

tasks.title: Integration tests: runtime path consumption
steps: Planner/propose/execute use scoped provider/model.
Global config mutation mid-run does not affect running goal.
Trace fields prove snapshot source.

tasks.title: E2E tests: parallel scenario isolation
steps: Start 3 goals simultaneously with distinct profiles.
Assert each goal keeps its own backend/provider/model.
Assert no cross-goal config contamination.

tasks.title: Docs and operator playbook
steps: Document config hierarchy and precedence.
Document profile authoring and rollout.
Document troubleshooting for isolation failures.

tasks.title: Runbook dual-mode documentation
steps: Add explicit Zielmodus goal_scoped section.
Mark global /config scenario patching as legacy fallback.
Document expected runner flags for both modes.
Document required evidence fields in acceptance report.

tasks.title: Runner report validation for scoped config evidence
steps: Test that goal_scoped mode never calls set_config_patch for per-scenario config injection.
Test that legacy_global_config mode keeps old behavior.
Test report serialization includes config_mode/config_profile/config_checksum.
Test parallel mode refuses legacy_global_config by default.

execution_plan: Phase 5: T-018..T-019 (runbook dual-mode hardening + report evidence tests)

risks.risk: Partial runtime paths still read global config
risks.mitigation: Add trace field goal_config_source and enforce in integration tests.

risks.risk: Performance overhead from deep merge per task
risks.mitigation: Resolve once per goal, cache immutable snapshot by goal_id.
Lazy fallback + explicit regression tests for old payloads.

risks.risk: Runner remains global-config based despite goal-scoped server support
risks.mitigation: Add --config-mode, mark goal_scoped as target default, and test that goal_scoped does not call POST /config per scenario.

risks.risk: Reports contain scenario labels but no proof of effective runtime config
risks.mitigation: Require config_checksum, goal_config_source=snapshot and GET /goals/{id}/effective-config evidence in reports.

definition_of_done: 3x3 Szenario-Report enthält isolierte Provider/Model-Belege pro Goal.
Goal-scoped Runner-Report beweist goal_config_source=snapshot pro Run.
Legacy global /config-Modus ist dokumentiert, getestet und nicht Default für Zielabnahme.
Dokumentation für Betrieb und Debugging vorhanden.
